rule.descr: Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule

revision.description: admin@192.168.10.10 (Local Database): Firewall: Rules - saved/edited a firewall rule.

package.name: AWS VPC Wizard
package.descr: AWS VPC Wizard.<br /> This package implements a wizard for configuring AWS VPC instances on a pfSense firewall.<br />

package.name: IPsec Profile Wizard
package.descr: IPsec profile wizard for iOS and Windows Clients<br /> This package generates IPsec client profiles for iOS and Windows devices.<br />

package.name: Netgate Nexus
package.descr: Netgate(R) Nexus revolutionizes multi-instance management for pfSense(R) Plus, empowering operators to effortlessly manage hundreds of pfSense Plus instances through a secure, unified, and intuitive interface. With its comprehensive GUI and robust REST API, Netgate Nexus gives your organization the flexibility to tailor and automate critical operational tasks, driving greater efficiency and agility. Whether you're scaling deployments or streamlining network management, Netgate Nexus delivers the control and customization you need to stay ahead.

package.name: WireGuard
OpenVPN Client Export Utility
package.descr: Allows a pre-configured OpenVPN Windows Client or Mac OS X's Viscosity configuration bundle to be exported directly from pfSense.

package.name: squid3
package.descr: High performance web proxy cache (3.4 branch). It combines Squid as a proxy server with its capabilities of acting as a HTTP / HTTPS reverse proxy.<br /> It includes an Exchange-Web-Access (OWA) Assistant, SSL filtering and antivirus integration via C-ICAP.

package.name: Lightsquid
package.descr: LightSquid is a high performance web proxy reporting tool. Includes proxy realtime statistics (SQStat). <strong>Requires Squid package.</strong>

menu.name: Squid Reverse Proxy
menu.tooltiptext: Modify the reverse proxy server settings

service.name: c-icap
service.description: ICAP Interface for Squid and ClamAV integration
